name: codedna-plugin
description: CodeDNA helps Codex handle complex coding tasks through a double-strand planning, execution, review, and memory workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through high-stakes coding tasks with planning, review, and local memory.
interface.longDescription: CodeDNA is a local Codex workflow plugin for complex coding work. It helps Codex turn user intent into a structured plan, keep execution inside clear boundaries, review the result against the original request, and preserve confirmed learning locally. Public documentation describes the workflow at a high level while the plugin performs the detailed orchestration inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Fix this coding task with minimal, verified changes.
Analyze this request first and do not edit files yet.
Review this Codex result against my original request.
